positive: A clean, minimalist silhouette illustration of a gentle astronaut floating in deep space. The astronaut is rendered in a stylish, flowing jumpsuit against a cosmic backdrop of nebulae and star fields. The composition must feature strong, contrasting negative space, emphasizing the silhouette's form. Use a limited, cool color palette of deep indigos, cyan, and violet, with stark white accents for the stars. The style should be modern vector art mixed with ethereal watercolor washes, designed to look excellent printed on a dark-colored t-shirt. Highly detailed, centered, perfect composition, clean edges.
